你.definition: you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您[nin2])

大.definition: big; large; great; older (than another person); eldest (as in 大姐[da4 jie3]); greatly; freely; fully; (dialect) father; (dialect) uncle (father's brother)

好.definition: good; appropriate; proper; all right!; (before a verb) easy to; (before a verb) good to; (before an adjective for exclamatory effect) so; (verb complement indicating completion); (of two people) close; on intimate terms; (after a personal pronoun) hello

大人.definition: adult; grownup; title of respect toward superiors

人大.definition: Renmin University of China (abbr. for 中國人民大學|中国人民大学[Zhong1 guo2 Ren2 min2 Da4 xue2])

好人.definition: good person; healthy person; person who tries not to offend anyone, even at the expense of principle
